name: standards-refresh.sh rejects an unknown --gate mode with a usage error naming the supported review-queue mode
command: OUT=/tmp/cl564-r23-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf 'sources: []\n' > $OUT/reg.yaml && cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --gate everything-goes 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'unknown --gate mode' e.err && grep -q 'review-queue' e.err && echo unknown-gate-mode-usage-error 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
